items.value: Gives you the highest digit that is above 0 in your YTP counter squared by 2.25.
Gives you the square root of the amount of points you got.
Awards -25 YTPs upon collection.
Awards -50 YTPs upon collection.
Awards -75 YTPs upon collection.
Gives you 3 YTPs most of the time, with a rare chance to give 31, and an even rarer CHANCE to give 314.
Bounces around the room it is placed in. Awards 65 YTPs upon collection.
Gives a random value of between 5 and 105 YTPs.
Gives a random value of between -100 and 300 YTPs.
Gives some YTPs and forces the player's camera to rotate towards the right.
Gives some YTPs and forces the player's camera to rotate towards the left.
65% chance to give YTPs, 25% chance to get a random item.
Awards 25 YTPs and teleports somewhere else upon collection.
Awards 40-60 YTPs and a speed boost for 10 seconds upon collection.
Spawns a clustor of YTPs that hop between item spots upon collection.
Copies over any other YTP the player has picked up.
Gives 150 YTPs and disables the power of the current room.
Turns into a fake item and alerts Baldi.
Refills 31.4% of your stamina and gives a 31.4% speed boost for 31.4 seconds.
Refills 100% of your stamina.
Refills 50% of your stamina with each use. Has 4 uses.
Gives +50% stamina, cuts your stamina drop in half, makes you guilty and reveals your location to everyone around you.
The player eats it at random intervals after using it, giving some stamina and leaving behind cell-sized crumbs that slow down NPCs when stepping on them.
Refills 50% of your stamina and makes it regenerate and drop 50% faster.
Functions as both a quarter and a zesty bar.
Refills your stamina to 350% and gives you a 10% speed boost, but makes Baldi always know where you.
Gives +150% stamina and freezes cells you walk on.
Makes you faster with no stamina loss for 30 seconds. Then, you slow down until you reach 100% stamina again.
Only gives 50% stamina. Worse than a water fountain.
Gives some stamina. If you use a BSODA or a BSODA variant afterwards, it will explode.
Gives a lot of stamina but alerts Baldi to your location.
Speeds you up by 15%.
Gives a ton of stamina but slows you down. Has 3 uses.
Doubles your speed after eating.
Gives you +25% stamina and alerts Baldi.
Sets your stamina to 200% but you constantly lose it until you have 50% left
Blows up after you eat it, pushing you and everyone else away.
Makes characters in a 6-cell radious around you blind.
Makes you invinvible to Baldi for some time but also slows you down.
Refills your stamina to 100% and gives a random amount of YTPs.
Forces you to walk and spit smoke
Has 3 speeding effects in it.
Same mechanic as Grandma Brownies...
Restores stamina, gives 'Nana Peel.
Speed boost for 15 seconds or when the player regains stamina somehow.
Allows you to teleport to a specified location on the map. It's range is quite limited, though.
Teleports you back to where you were 10 seconds ago, unless Baldi is there.
Teleports you to a random room of the same room type you're currently in.
Works just like a Dangerous Teleporter but leaves 'Nana Peels at every place you teleported to.
Gives you detention remotely.
Works like a Dangerous Teleporter but slows you down afterwards.
Dangerous Teleporter but with 5 uses.
Teleports you to a random open exit.
Teleports you 8 times every 8 seconds.
Functions like a Dangerous Teleporter but slows down time during and after use.
Spawns a blackhole that teleports entities randomly.
Teleports the Principal to you, with a 25% chance of teleporting someone else instead.
Calls Principal and Baldi to whatever wall you're aiming at.
Works like a Principal Whistle but also gives guilt to the nearest character.
Works like a 'Nana Peel but every time you hit a wall you get teleported.
Can be droppped like a 'Nana Peel. Pushes away anyone who steps on it
Works like a 'Nana peel but you can toggle what direction you want to slip in beforehand.
Blinds everyone around it when it goes off.
Can be thrown like a 'Nana Peel and gives a button item when used. Using the button item will trigger it.
Not to be confused with the Chocolate Banana. Can be thrown like a 'Nana Peel but slides when it hits the ground, picking up anyone on it's path.
Works like a 'Nana Peel but also freezes whatever's on it after it stops sliding
A 5-use 'Nana Peel.
Can be spilled on the ground. Anyone who steps on the water spill may slip forwards or backwards.
Refills 50 stamina and spawns a slippery butter peel on the floor.
A throwable peel only you can slip on, with full control for the player. Bumping a wall stuns you and makes noise.
A potent 'Nana Peel variant that delivers a powerful push to any NPC it touches instead of making them slide.
Peel that hunts nearest entity then settles.
A 3-use quarter that makes you guilty after using it.
Gives 4 of a product when used on a vending machine
Can be used like a quarter but has a 40% chance to not work and makes you guilty.
When used can either give you a quarter, return the penny or both.
Makes you faster and your stamina not drain for 30 seconds, but sets it to 0 afterwards.
While wearing it, you can send anyone except Baldi and Principal to detention. Makes you guilty while wearing it.
A Dirty Chalk Eraser with a larger radious
Destroys all windows, pushes everyone back and makes a large cloud of chalk when used.
Makes black dust clouds.
Makes a big cloud of chalk and some electricity.
Blows a bunch of chalk in front of you
Using it on a door makes characters unable to enter it.
After using it on a door, it will make it unable to be locked ever again, unless it's an Office door.
You can unlock any door with it (Shape locked doors, locked doors, coin doors etc.)
Can be used as either a Principal's Keys or a Zesty Bar.
5-use Principal's Keys that can also unlock Shape locks.
2-use key that when used on a locked door can either unlock it, do nothing or teleport an NPC to it.
Can be used as either Safety Scissors or Principal's Keys.
3-use Safety Scissors with a small chance to work on each use.
Can be used as Safety Scissors or can be used to stab NPCs.
Can lock both swinging doors and normal doors.
You can use it to lock normal doors only. It will disappear after 3 rattles.
Works like a Swinging Door Lock but lets the player pass through it.
Makes opening doors silent for 60 seconds.
Makes you invincible for 60 seconds.
Techno-Boots but they last 30 seconds.
Makes stamina drain faster and pushes everyone away while moving.
Pushes everyone away while active.
Shrinks the player and allows them to pass through doors and NPCs.
Slows down time for a while.
Like an Alarm Clock but it moves around.
Works like an Alarm Clock but explodes after activating, pushing everyone near it away.
Makes every NPC go towards it when it rings.
Teleports you to it 1 minute after placing, and may attract Baldi as well.
Turns off every room for some time.
Chases and stuns Baldi temporarily.
Makes Baldi rush towards it and distracts him for a while.
Starts a party event. But without the present.
Makes everyone go away and ignore everything.
Silences noise and spawns random wormholes for 60s.
Pushes characters away when the hook hits them.
Pulls characters towards you if the hook hits them.
Like a grappling hook but bounces off walls 3 times.
Grappling Hook with a limited range before it breaks.
Charges you forward at high speed for 2 seconds. Charge cancels on collision.
Placing it on a wall and walking into it will teleport you to a random place.
Only lets the player pass through it.
Placeable  on walls like a Portal Poster but teleports you somewhere random when you enter.
Makes you invisible AND invincible for some time.
Like a Super Stretchy Glove but it teleports you to whatever you interacted with. The item timer gets shortened every time you do this.
BSODA but it pushes NPCs around the halls until it runs out.
BSODA but it shoots 3 sprays.
Shakes for a bit when placed, and explodes afterwards, pushing everyone away and leaving a mess behind.
BSODA but it squishes characters it hits as well as pushing them.
BSODA but it sets your stamina to 200% and is faster.
Can't push characters but creates a sticky puddle at where it hit the wall.
BSODA but it also stuns characters.
Shoots an insanely fast BSODA spray.
BSODA but it lasts for 5 seconds and goes backwards.
BSODA but it barely even moves.
Every Diet... BSODA in one can.
Latches onto whoever it was sprayed at and pushes them.
Sticks onto a character and blinds them when thrown.
BSODA but it leaves behind slippery ice-puzzle puddles.
SPIN SPIN SPIN
Swinging Door Lock but you can place it anywhere.
Places itself on the ground when used. If anyone walks over it, it explodes and has a chance of sending a BSODA spray.
Slightly faster BSODA that also bounces off of walls
Splits into two sprays when it hits a wall
Literally just a BSODA. How lazy.
BSODA but it shocks anyone it touches. Electrecuted things shake for some time.
Throw classic fire flowers to kill NPCs.
Slows down NPCs it hits and gives you some stamina.
Pushes characters away from all directions when placed
BSODA that gets faster for every character it hits.
BSODA but it gets deleted early if it touches 3 NPCs.
Blasts off a soda spray that is so acidic it blind NPCs.
"Great job! You're doing fantastic!"
BSODA that makes cells WD-NoSquee cover
Put on the floor and wait it to explode to throw spikes all around!
Explode NPCs (like Retro Fire Flower).
Fill up a Baldi Balloon that kick people around.
Shoot a BSODA spray in all cardinal directions.
Shoots out snowballs that hit NPCs.
A bouncy spiky ball that kick people away. Really useful.
BSODA but it attracts NPCs to it.
Shoot 4 diet BSODAs at all 4 cardinal directions.
Attracts all NPCs to your location and spawns balloons.
Launches a spray that explodes on impact, knocking back nearby characters.
Shoots one BSODA per second for seven seconds.
Spray that petrifies characters for 15s.
WD-NoSquee but it unmutes libraries and amplify noises.
WD-NoSquee but it slows characters in it's radious instead of muting sounds.
Literally just the old WD-NoSquee.
Cleans up 3 tile range, making cells muted and slippery.
An enhanced WD-NoSquee with 3 uses, which has a bigger effect radius and makes everyone invisible inside it.
Throw at Baldi and Baldi will catch it for himself.
Baldi has suffered enough...
Put it on a plant and let it grow!
Baldi won't like you for doing this...
Baldi... eats air?
Baldi will taste on this for longer, but his speed will increase too!
Baldi will unpeel this tasty chocolate banana, and leave behind its powerful 'Nana Peel!
An apple for Baldi that, when used, forces Baldi to slip a 'Nana Peel.
Playtime loves these!
Baldi will definitely praise you for longer, but if he finds out you didn't earn it...
Will make Principal really relaxed, ignoring you, and clearing out the detention streaks.
Give it to Baldi. He drinks it, then it explodes, stunning him.
Throws slices to freeze NPCs for 40s. 6 uses.
Johnny would love it, give it to him!
Trade this with Johnny for three quarters!
Makes you earn more items in a Field Trip.
Any student accepts this item as theirs.
